description.value:
Frequency once every 10 minutes

You draw the cloak close and let the world look past you. Using this action applies Effect: Overlooked to you: your next @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Hide]{Hide} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Sneak]{Sneak} this turn gains a +2 circumstance bonus. If that Stealth check succeeds, you also gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your next @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Create a Diversion]{Create a Diversion} before the end of your turn. Apply that +1 by hand, since it depends on the result.
